subject: [SDNC] Bump SDNC and CCSDK versions for London release
commit_message:
[SDNC] Bump SDNC and CCSDK versions for London release

Subset of SDNC patch https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/134393
Left out SDNC version update and cluient update (patchset 9) to test...
Bump versions of SDNC and CCSDK docker images for London release,
ueb-listener to use sdc-distr-client 2.0.0 (kafka native)
Use Strimzi KafkaUser template

Issue-ID: CCSDK-3876
Issue-ID: CCSDK-1789

Signed-off-by: Andreas Geissler <andreas-geissler@telekom.de>
Change-Id: I5741714d2cd5cd55fd37bbc1a6502ce85093102b
